title: High Heels High
description: Justine is the leader of the most popular girls in school and faces off against her nemesis, Tatiana.
quote: They gave you a new face and… it’s mine!
altHero: Justine, a blonde girl in a red dress, making finger quotes
alt1: group of teen girls in colorful clothes
alt2: Justine and the girls talking with Tatiana whose face is bandaged up
alt3: Tatiana removes her bandages and Justine is shocked
alt4: Tatiana and Justine look exactly alike
